## 1. COMPANY DEEP DIVE

### Founding & History

**Trade Capital Fund** (tradecapitalfund.com) — The domain tradecapitalfund.com does not host a prop firm website. Instead, it redirects to **HugeDomains.com** with a listing showing the domain is **FOR SALE for $495**.

### Domain Status

| Check | Result |
|-------|--------|
| DNS Resolution | Resolves to HugeDomains |
| HTTP Response | Redirects to domain sale page |
| Active Website | **NO** — domain is for sale |
| Domain Price | $495 (or $20.63/month for 24 months) |
| Domain Length | 16 characters |

### Company Information

**No company exists at this domain.** The domain name "TradeCapitalFund.com" is available for purchase, indicating:
1. The domain was never registered by a prop firm
2. Or, a previous owner let the domain expire
3. The domain is now held by a domain reseller

### Historical Context

The domain has been listed for sale on HugeDomains for an unknown period. There is no evidence that a prop firm by this name ever operated at this domain.
